content_fingerprint: elevenlabs updates api agents and creative tools across multiple weeks in april 2026 elevenlabs has shipped a series of api sdk and product updates across its voice and audio platform over the past three weeks adding new endpoints updating existing ones and expanding its developer tooling around speech to text voice synthesis and ai agents the elevenlabs changelog for april 2026 shows a sustained cadence of updates spanning three weekly release windows april 20 april 13 and april 7 touching multiple platform pillars including the elevenagents suite the elevenapi reference elevencreative studio
